title: Elevated Nonsense Lite
description: The Vanilla+ modpack for the Elevated Nonsense SMP, rebooted!
body:
Welcome to Elevated Nonsense Lite - a Vanilla+ modpack focusing on the essential mods of fans from the original Elevated Nonsense SMP. The pack will gradually be added upon over time, with requests from the community, as we're able to facilitate more mods again

The pack includes mods related to:
- Performance Optimization, via Embeddium
- Various Quality of Life improvements, via Quark, FallingTree, Dynamic Lights, and more
- A bit of technology, via Create
- Simple Voice Chat
- Gravestones 
- Waystones
- Xaero's Minimap and World Map
- Furniture via Handcrafted and Fantasy's Furniture

The pack also includes two shaders, working through Oculus:
- Complimentary Shaders Reimagined
- Rethinking Voxels

Also included is the server IP for Elevated Nonsense Lite. If you would like to join, follow the link on this modpack's page to the Discord server! We'd be glad to receive your application. Just make sure you're at least 16 years of age
